user.title: Plant monitor (MQTT)
user.description: Enter the same topic prefix and compact Wi-Fi MAC that the firmware uses (see serial log). MQTT must already be configured in Home Assistant.

error.bad_mac: MAC must resolve to exactly 12 hexadecimal characters.
error.mqtt_not_connected: MQTT is not connected. Configure the MQTT integration first.

init.title: Moisture zones
init.description: Adjust the shared 0–100% bands for all soil channels plus an optional HA persistent toast when moisture drops below each channel threshold.

data.notify_dry_persistent: Show persistent Home Assistant notifications for dry alarms

error.invalid_zones: Bands must rise in ascending order with min lower than max, every label non-empty.
